## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any issue or OpenSpec change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (a rule/plugin crashes or flags valid code)
- [ ] New rule / stack / add-on
- [ ] Rule policy change (enables / disables / loosens a rule)
- [ ] Build / tooling / docs only

## SemVer impact

<!-- patch · minor (new error-level rule) · major (removed/loosened rule changes results) -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test:run` pass
- [ ] `npm run verify:examples` passes (or the pre-push hook ran)
- [ ] Added/updated a fixture or test for any changed rule behavior
- [ ] Updated the [rules reference](../docs/reference/plugins.md) if behavior changed
- [ ] Added an entry to [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md)
